Definition: Regime or phase has few observations.

Definition: Observed value differs strongly from the prior forecast.
Interpretation effect: Indicates possible model discrepancy during the affected phase.

Definition: Innovations retain the same sign over a run.

Definition: Forecast target/origin is outside documented phase support.
